untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires visual/morphological analysis of peak structure (wide bases, gentle turns, peak amplitude comparison between 'Eve' and 'Adam' tops, spike frequency analysis). These characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal depends on candlestick pattern recognition and relative peak morphology analysis that is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Eve & Eve Double Top is a visual pattern requiring identification of: (1) two similar peaks with wide bases, (2) gentle price turns at tops, (3) shorter/more numerous spikes in Eve peaks vs Adam peaks, and (4) confirmation via close below support line. While a close below pivot point approximates the 'confirmation line' concept, the core pattern recognition elements (peak structure, base width, turn gentleness, spike frequency comparison) are not expressible with available indicators. Manual pattern detection or custom pattern recognition logic would be required.
